name: Garlic Artichoke Dip (Christopher Ranch)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup marinated artichoke hearts, finely chopped
4 ounces chopped green chile peppers OR one small can
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Spoon the mixture into a baking dish.
3. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F.
4. Serve with crackers or French bread.
